name: Blaze Drifter
author: Poki
description: Blaze Drifter is a thrilling 3D driving game where you aim to become the fastest driver on the road! Speed up, turn, drift, jump, and takedown—perform all the stunts and tricks to stay ahead! Hone your skills by completing levels one by one, or jump into PvP mode to challenge other players. Collect coins on the road and earn rewards from each match to buy cooler cars. Are you ready to prove you're the best driver ever? How to play Blaze Drifter? Use WASD or the arrow keys to steer Who created Blaze Drifter? Blaze Drifter is created by Deer Cat Games. Play their other games on Poki: Super Tunnel Rush , Tunnel Rush , Tunnel Rush 2 , Super Speeder , Wave Rider and Strings ! How can I play Blaze Drifter for free? You can play Blaze Drifter for free on Poki. Can I play Blaze Drifter on mobile devices and desktop? Blaze Drifter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
